text.value:
DELETE t
FROM reporting.HistoricalMemberLevel t
INNER JOIN dbo.tblMember tm ON tm.id = t.memberId
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON tm.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
/**WHERE 
    sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
    OR (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
        AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
        AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
        AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
    );
**/

DELETE t
FROM dbo.IepGoal t
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON t.childProfileId = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
/**WHERE 
    sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
    OR (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
        AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
        AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
        AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
    );
**/

DELETE t
FROM dbo.IepObjective t
INNER JOIN dbo.IepGoal ieg ON t.Iepgoalid = ieg.id
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON ieg.childProfileId = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
/**WHERE 
    sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
    OR (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
        AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
        AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
        AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
    );
**/

DELETE t
FROM dbo.IepPlanDates t
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON t.childProfileId = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE 
    sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
    OR (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
        AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
        AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
        AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
    );

INNER JOIN dbo.tblMember tm ON tm.id = t.memberId
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON tm.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
/**WHERE 
    sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
    OR (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
        AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
        AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
        AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())

DELETE t
FROM dbo.KareoInsuranceCompanies t
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON t.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE 
    sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
    OR (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
        AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
        AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
        AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
    );

DELETE t
FROM dbo.KareoSettings t
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON t.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE 
    sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
    OR (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
        AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
        AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
        AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
    );

DELETE t
FROM dbo.LearningProcessAttributes t
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM dbo.BehaviorTracking b
    JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON cp.id = b.ChildProfileID
    JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE b.LearningProcessAttributesId = t.ID
)
OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM dbo.AccountInfo a
    JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE a.LearningProcessAttributesId = t.ID
)
OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM dbo.CurrentCurriculum cc
    JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON cp.id = cc.childProfileid
    JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE cc.LearningProcessAttributesId = t.ID
);

DELETE t
FROM dbo.learningprompt t
INNER JOIN dbo.LearningProcessAttributes lp ON t.LearningProcessAttributesId = lp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.CurrentCurriculum cc ON cc.LearningProcessAttributesId = lp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON cc.childProfileid = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
/**WHERE 
    sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
    OR (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
        AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
        AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
        AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
    );
**/

DELETE t
FROM dbo.Lesson t
WHERE t.ID IN (
    SELECT t.id
    FROM dbo.Lesson t
    JOIN dbo.Subscription s ON s.id = t.SubscriptionId
    JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON s.accountInfoId = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId

    UNION

    SELECT t.id
    FROM dbo.Lesson t
    JOIN dbo.LessonAccountCustomCategory cc ON cc.LessonId = t.id
    JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON cc.AccountId = atd.AccountId

    UNION

    SELECT t.id
    FROM dbo.Lesson t
    JOIN dbo.LessonCustomCategory cc ON cc.LessonId = t.id
    JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON cp.id = cc.ClientId
    JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId

    UNION

    SELECT t.id
    FROM dbo.Lesson t
    JOIN dbo.LessonNote n ON n.lessonId = t.id
    JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON cp.id = n.childProfileId
    JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
)
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM dbo.hcFormResponseLessonsExcluded hfrle
    WHERE hfrle.LessonId = t.id
)
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM dbo.LessonCustomCategory lcc
    WHERE lcc.LessonId = t.id
);

DELETE t
FROM dbo.LessonAccountCustomCategory t
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON t.accountId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE 
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );

DELETE t
FROM dbo.LessonBehaviorGraphLink t
JOIN dbo.BehaviorTracking bt ON bt.id = t.BehaviorId
JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON cp.id = bt.childProfileId
JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE 
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );

DELETE t
FROM dbo.LessonBehaviorGraphLink t
INNER JOIN dbo.hcFormResponse fr ON t.hcFormResponseId = fr.id
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON fr.childProfileId = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId;

DELETE t
FROM dbo.LessonNote t
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON t.childProfileId = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE
    sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
    OR (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
        AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
        AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
        AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
    );

WITH cteLessons AS (
    SELECT t.id 
    FROM dbo.Lesson t
    JOIN dbo.Subscription s ON s.id = t.SubscriptionId
    JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON s.accountInfoId = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE 
        (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
            OR (
                sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
                AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
                AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
                AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
            )
        )

    UNION

    SELECT t.id
    FROM dbo.Lesson t
    JOIN dbo.LessonAccountCustomCategory cc ON cc.LessonId = t.id
    JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cc.AccountId = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE 
        (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
            OR (
                sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
                AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
                AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
                AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
            )
        )

    UNION

    SELECT t.id
    FROM dbo.Lesson t
    JOIN dbo.LessonCustomCategory cc ON cc.LessonId = t.id
    JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON cp.id = cc.ClientId
    JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE 
        (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
            OR (
                sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
                AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
                AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
                AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
            )
        )

    UNION

    SELECT t.id
    FROM dbo.Lesson t
    JOIN dbo.LessonNote n ON n.lessonId = t.id
    JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON cp.id = n.childProfileId
    JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE 
        (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
            OR (
                sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
                AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
                AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
                AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
            )
        )
)

DELETE t
FROM dbo.LessonResources t
JOIN cteLessons l ON l.id = t.LessonId;

DELETE t
FROM dbo.LessonStep t
INNER JOIN dbo.Lesson l ON t.LessonId = l.id
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription s ON s.id = l.SubscriptionId
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON s.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE 
    (
        s.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            s.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND s.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND s.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );

DELETE t
FROM dbo.LessonStrategy t
INNER JOIN dbo.Lesson l ON t.LessonId = l.id
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription s ON s.id = l.SubscriptionId
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON s.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE 
    (
        s.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            s.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND s.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND s.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );

/**
DELETE t
FROM dbo.LessonTarget t
JOIN dbo.Lesson l ON t.LessonId = l.id
LEFT JOIN dbo.Subscription s ON s.id = l.SubscriptionId
LEFT JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON s.accountInfoId = a.ID
LEFT JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE 
    (
        l.SubscriptionId IS NULL
        OR (
            atd.AccountId IS NOT NULL
            AND (
                s.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
                OR (
                    s.OrganizationTypeId = 2
                    AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
                    AND s.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
                    AND s.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
                )
            )
        )
    );

*/

DELETE t
FROM dbo.LessonTarget t
INNER JOIN dbo.Lesson l ON t.LessonId = l.id
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription s ON s.id = l.SubscriptionId
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON s.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
INNER JOIN dbo.Targets trg on trg.id=t.TargetId
WHERE 
    (
        l.SubscriptionId IS NULL
        OR (
            atd.AccountId IS NOT NULL
            AND (
                s.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
                OR (
                    s.OrganizationTypeId = 2
                    AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
                    AND s.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
                    AND s.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
                )
            )
        )
    );

text.value:
DELETE t
FROM dbo.MFAUnsubscribedMembers t
INNER JOIN dbo.tblMember tm ON tm.id = t.memberId
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON tm.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE 
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );
